name: allergy
title: best herbal teas for allergy
description: Thymus serpyllum tea contains bioactive constituents such as thymol, carvacrol, and rosmarinic acid, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties, making it an effective herbal remedy for treating allergy-related ailments. The properties of this tea include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and promote relaxation, providing relief from symptoms such as itching, sneezing, and runny nose.
